title: test mock foundation hardening
goal: 新機能追加時に既存テストモックが壊れにくい基盤へ改善する
constraints: must not change orchestration runtime behavior
must keep existing passing tests green
test helpers must remain readable and deterministic
allowed_changes_detail: backend/tests/conftest.py: shared fixture and mock helper definition
backend/tests/test_*.py: mock import path adjustment only if required by new shared fixtures
